# Packages whose unit tests pass on Windows (the "green list").
# Consumed by .github/workflows/windows-gate.yml. One package per line;
# lines starting with # are ignored.
#
# Baseline measured 2026-07-15 on the Windows port box (audit gw-z9u):
# GC_FAST_UNIT=1 go test -p=4 -count=1 ./... — 71 green packages.
# Grow this list as Phase 2 (gw-l8d, gw-kbr) lands; the end state is
# "everything minus documented exclusions", at which point this file
# inverts into an exclusion list or disappears.
